adjusted.reasoning: Both already through; only a Norway win changes placings (France tops the group otherwise). France are favoured (-160) but this is a dead-ish seeding game and they are disrupted: Deschamps has flown home after his mother's death (assistant Stephan in charge) and is likely to rest Saliba, while Norway have Haaland (4 goals already) and a concrete incentive to win for top spot. Nudged a touch toward Norway/draw from market (FRA 58%); model's 71% France ignores the rotation and stakes.

factors.factor: Both qualified; only a NOR win changes placings (FRA tops otherwise); FRA -160
Deschamps absent (bereavement), asst Stephan in charge, may rest Saliba; Norway Ryerson doubtful; Haaland 4 goals
